decisionPanels.title: Tonight's decision
decisionPanels.summary: Shift from brand-only posting to fast journalist-led original vertical packaging; ranking systems are rewarding same-day relevance and distinct voice.
actions: Set a same-day SLA: ingest-to-first 9:16 cut for each major story package.
Apply an originality gate before publish: new angle, clear why-now, identifiable reporter voice.
Keep one fixed opening hook template to reduce edit latency while preserving editorial quality.

decisionPanels.title: Ops stack watch (iconik/LucidLink/Backlight)
decisionPanels.summary: LucidLink Connect + Guest Access + directory API are concrete workflow levers; Backlight signal continues toward review collaboration and social-output throughput.
actions: Run a 1-week MMR spike on linked-object access assumptions to cut duplicate copies/handoffs.
Use Guest Access patterns for external review handoff simplification where policy allows.
Retain morning manual verification for iconik/LucidLink exact build deltas due overnight anti-bot limits.

decisionPanels.title: Audience growth signal
decisionPanels.summary: YouTube and Meta continue rewarding timely, original creator-style output while industry forecasts show personality-led news pressure on traditional distribution.
actions: Pilot journalist-account + Guardian-account dual distribution with shared analytics review.
Track first-hour engagement quality by format and presenter identity, not just views.
Prioritize fast explainers and context cuts on same-day stories over late polished recuts.

changes.summary: Model shifted from watch-mode to execution mode: same-day vertical speed, originality discipline, and targeted storage/workflow friction reduction.
